title: Lots Of Addons
description: This is a small(for now) mod that adds lots of stuff like a taco.
body:
A Minecraft mod for Forge 1.20.1 with lots of stuff to play with. This mod contains the following:

-A penguin mob, that does not seem to move (im not sure tho),

-A new ore that is accesible with villagers,

-1 new biome simulating the End in the Overworld,

-Taco food item, crafted with bread and steak,

-A new structure that ONYL spawns in the End.
Hope you have fun!
